reviews.review_description: Full of glitches was buttons do not respond well. Most poses are out of sight to follow.

I would like to know if there is a place where I can write directly to the developers. I just bought it and it actually has many movements I can copy. I don't really mind if there is accuracy for the price I just paid. Is just a mirror but you can choose different angles. I miss some more control on what movements to do and when to do them and pause them or change the pace of each position. I think this game has a lot of room to improve but I would like to know more about developers roadmap, if they are still working on it, more information about how many positions for each level (beginner, intermediate and advanced) it has, if they will include more...or what are the plans for this game. I tried to contact this email tlz at tianlingamestudio dot com from their website but is not working. I'd love to add 5 stars and that it will be my to go app to practice yoga and learn the positions, anyway there's nothing really good out there for Yoga and I don't like subscriptions.
